description: Lightweight fixture-based evaluation set for the local RAG pipeline.

examples.question: How does the system keep uploads fast when indexing may be slow?

conversation_history.content: Does the current system use reranking?
Optional heuristic reranking is available via ENABLE_RERANKING.

conversation_history.content: Which file stores document registry entries?
The document registry is stored in registry.json.
